title: The Coal Mines (Special Provisions) Act, 2015
full_text: The Coal Mines (Special Provisions) Act, 2015 कोयला खान (विशेष उपबंध) अधिनियम,2015 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201511 Act Number: 11 Enactment Date: 2015-03-30 Act Year: 2015 Short Title: The Coal Mines (Special Provisions) Act, 2015 Hindi Title: कोयला खान (विशेष उपबंध) अधिनियम,2015 Long Title: An Act to provide for allocation of coal mines and vesting of the right, title and interest in and over the land and mine infrastructure together with mining leases to successful bidders and allottees with a view to ensure continuity in coal mining operations and production of coal, and for promoting optimum utilisation of coal resources consistent with the requirement of the country in national interest and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Coal Enforcement Date: 21-10-2014 Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 3. THE THIRD SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 4. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Declaration as to expediency of Union action. Section 3. Definitions. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Eligibility to participate in auction and payment of fees. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Allotment of mines to Government companies or corporations. Show Related Subordinates Section 6. Nominated authority to issue vesting order or allotment order. Show Related Subordinates Section 9. Priority of disbursal of proceeds. Show Related Subordinates Section 10. Utilisation of movable property used in coal mining operations. Show Related Subordinates Section 11. Discharge or adoption of third party contracts with prior allottees. Show Related Subordinates Section 12. Provisions in relation to secured creditors. Show Related Subordinates Section 13. Void alienations and permitted security interests. Section 14. Liabilities of prior allottees. Section 15. Commissioner of payments to be appointed and his powers. Show Related Subordinates Section 16. Valuation of compensation for payment to prior allottee. Show Related Subordinates Section 17. Responsibility of Central Government after appointed date. Section 18. Central Government to appoint designated custodian. Show Related Subordinates Section 19. Powers and functions of designated custodian in respect of Schedule II coal mines. Show Related Subordinates Section 20. Power of Central Government to approve certain arrangements. Show Related Subordinates Section 21. Acquisition of land. Section 22. Realisation of additional levy. Section 23. Penalties for certain offences. Section 24. Penalty for failure to comply with directions of Central Government. Show Related Subordinates Section 25. Offences by companies. Section 26. Cognizance of offences. Section 27. Dispute settlement and Bar of Jurisdiction of civil courts. Section 28. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 29. Act to have overriding effect. Section 30. Amendment of certain Acts contained in Schedule IV. Section 31. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 32. Power to remove difficulties. Show Related Subordinates Section 33. Repeal and saving. Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 3. THE THIRD SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 4.
